gates.label: Media Sources
gates.nextAction: Attach approved audio, video, and radio source URLs.
gates.verification: Run media source setup, rebuild, then run media and release-readiness QA.

gates.label: Inbox Notifications
gates.nextAction: Configure the approved sender and inbox provider, then replay pending inbox records.
gates.verification: Run provider readiness and form delivery QA after inbox setup.

gates.label: Private Handoff
gates.nextAction: Signed Firebase private handoff is active. Choose an external CRM or Google workflow target only after the private workflow is approved.
gates.verification: Run provider readiness, integration QA, and pending handoff replay after any target change.

gates.label: Operator Reporting
gates.nextAction: Configure the private operator report token hash for pilot reporting access.
gates.verification: Run provider readiness with an approved operator token.

gates.label: Privacy Review
gates.nextAction: Complete legal review of the Privacy page before full public launch.
gates.verification: Mark Privacy approved in the legal review manifest, then run release-readiness QA.

gates.label: Terms Review
gates.nextAction: Complete legal review of the Terms page before full public launch.
gates.verification: Mark Terms approved in the legal review manifest, then run release-readiness QA.

gates.label: WWW Redirect
gates.nextAction: Configure www.luxveritas.media DNS and Hosting redirect after the root domain remains stable.
gates.verification: Run domain-readiness QA after adding the Firebase Hosting www custom domain and required A or CNAME record.
